mapper.sql: permission_id, permission_code, permission_name, resource, action, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, deleted, created_by, updated_by, deleted_by
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_permission WHERE permission_id = #{permissionId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM t_permission WHERE permission_code = #{permissionCode} AND deleted = 0

SELECT DISTINCT p.* FROM t_permission p INNER JOIN t_role_permission rp ON p.permission_id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN t_user_role ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted = 0 AND ur.deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM t_permission WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_permission
permission_code = #{permissionCode}, permission_name = #{permissionName}, resource = #{resource}, action = #{action}, description = #{description}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE permission_id = #{permissionId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_permission SET deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE permission_id = #{permissionId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM t_permission WHERE permission_code = #{permissionCode} AND deleted = 0
